allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/interaction/agent -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"Met Dr. Priya Sharma today at 10:30 AM for a meeting. Discussed Product X efficacy. Shared the clinical study brochure. She seemed positive.","currentInteractionState":{}}')

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['updatedInteractionState']; print\('intent:',d['intent'],'| tool:',d['selectedTool']\); print\('hcpName:',s['hcpName'],'| sentiment:',s['sentiment'],'| type:',s['interactionType']\); print\('compliance:',d['complianceStatus']['status']\); print\('toolCalls:',d['toolCalls']\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/interaction/save -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"interaction":{"hcpName":"Dr. Priya Sharma","interactionType":"Meeting","date":"2026-07-09","topicsDiscussed":"Product X efficacy","sentiment":"Positive","materialsShared":["Clinical study brochure"]}}')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('results:', [\(r['name'],r['specialty']\) for r in d['results']]\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/interaction/agent" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"Show all interactions with Dr. Sharma"}')
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tool =', d['toolCalls']\); print\('msg  =', d['assistantMessage']\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/interaction/agent" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"Schedule a follow-up with Dr. Sharma for next Friday at 11 AM"}')
